# Dns Lookup

## Overview

gSage AI — DNS Lookup tool (MVP ⭐).

## Tool

| Tool | Summary | Permissions | Requires approval | Core |
| --- | --- | --- | :---: | :---: |
| `dns_lookup` | Resolve DNS records (A, AAAA, MX, TXT, NS, CNAME, SOA) for domains and reverse PTR for IPs | `dns:read` | — | — |
